## LinkedIn 版本（完整帖子）

### 中文版

```
🛡️ 如何让父母安全投资加密货币？我用 AI 解决了这个问题

当你的父母收到"Pi 币即将上币安，现在买入稳赚"的消息时，他们怎么知道这是真是假？

这是全球 4.2 亿加密货币用户中，超过 60% 非技术背景用户正在面对的信任与认知鸿沟。

我花了半个月时间，用 OpenClaw + Claude 构建了 Binance Guardian AI，一个专为不懂技术的家人设计的币圈安全助手。

🎯 核心功能：

1️⃣ 多链合约检测（9条区块链）
- 支持 Ethereum、BSC、Polygon、Arbitrum、Optimism、Avalanche、Fantom、Base、Solana
- 0-100 分直观评分，一看就懂
- 自动识别蜜罐、未验证合约、低流动性

2️⃣ 4维度风险评分引擎
- 安全审计 40% + 市场排名 30% + 代币信息 20% + 骗局检查 10%
- 实时评估币种安全性
- 每 30 秒更新一次

3️⃣ 人话翻译引擎
- 将 Launchpool 翻译成"像银行定期存款，本金安全，每天还送新币"
- 将 Staking 翻译成"定期存款赚利息"
- 10+ 专业术语实时翻译

4️⃣ 语音安全教育
- 每日 8:00 自动生成语音安全简报
- 支持中英文双语
- 适配视觉障碍和阅读困难用户

5️⃣ 守护者模式
- 密码保护的简化界面（5 个核心按钮）
- 防止误操作和功能滥用
- 专为长辈设计

📊 技术栈：
- Framework: OpenClaw (Agent orchestration)
- AI Model: Claude Sonnet 4.6 + Gemini 3.1 Flash
- Data: Binance API (read-only) + NOFX + Public Scam DB
- Interface: Telegram Bot
- Deployment: VPS (1C1G) + pm2

💡 为什么选择 OpenClaw？
- Agent Orchestration：轻松管理多个 AI 任务
- Multi-Model Routing：成本优化 70%
- Built-in Memory：自动记录用户偏好
- Cron Jobs：原生支持定时任务
- Telegram Integration：开箱即用

📈 实际效果：
- 响应时间 <500ms
- 内存占用 ~32MB
- 支持 100+ 并发用户
- 99.9% 可用性
- 成本仅 ¥80/月

🎥 视频演示：https://youtu.be/dqGWWQHO_CQ
⭐ GitHub：https://github.com/pjl914335852-ux/Binance-guardian-ai

本项目参与 Binance AI Hackathon 2026，展示 OpenClaw + Binance API + AI 驱动的创新安全解决方案。

让加密货币投资不再是年轻人的专利，让每个家庭都有一个可信赖的数字资产安全管家。

1 BNB 不多，但足以保护一个家庭的安全。

#BinanceHackathon #OpenClaw #AI #CryptoSafety #Blockchain #TelegramBot #OpenSource
```

### 英文版

```
🛡️ How to Make Crypto Investment Safe for Your Parents? I Built an AI Solution

When your parents receive a message saying "Pi coin is listing on Binance soon, buy now for guaranteed profit," how do they know if it's real or a scam?

This is the trust and knowledge gap faced by over 60% of the 420 million crypto users worldwide who lack technical backgrounds.

I spent half a month building Binance Guardian AI with OpenClaw + Claude—a crypto safety assistant designed specifically for non-technical family members.

🎯 Core Features:

1️⃣ Multi-Chain Contract Detection (9 blockchains)
- Supports Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Avalanche, Fantom, Base, Solana
- 0-100 intuitive scoring system
- Auto-detects honeypots, unverified contracts, low liquidity

2️⃣ 4-Dimensional Risk Scoring Engine
- Security Audit 40% + Market Ranking 30% + Token Info 20% + Scam Check 10%
- Real-time safety assessment
- Updates every 30 seconds

3️⃣ Plain Language Translation Engine
- Translates "Launchpool" to "Like a bank fixed deposit, principal is safe, plus daily new coin rewards"
- Translates "Staking" to "Fixed deposit earning interest"
- 10+ technical terms translated in real-time

4️⃣ Voice-First Safety Education
- Auto-generates voice safety briefings daily at 8:00 AM
- Supports Chinese and English
- Accessible for visually impaired and reading-challenged users

5️⃣ Guardian Mode Lock
- Password-protected simplified interface (5 core buttons)
- Prevents misoperations and feature abuse
- Designed specifically for elderly users

📊 Tech Stack:
- Framework: OpenClaw (Agent orchestration)
- AI Model: Claude Sonnet 4.6 + Gemini 3.1 Flash
- Data: Binance API (read-only) + NOFX + Public Scam DB
- Interface: Telegram Bot
- Deployment: VPS (1C1G) + pm2

💡 Why OpenClaw?
- Agent Orchestration: Easy multi-AI task management
- Multi-Model Routing: 70% cost optimization
- Built-in Memory: Auto-records user preferences
- Cron Jobs: Native scheduled task support
- Telegram Integration: Out-of-the-box

📈 Real Performance:
- Response time <500ms
- Memory usage ~32MB
- Supports 100+ concurrent users
- 99.9% uptime
- Cost only ¥80/month (~$11)

🎥 Video Demo: https://youtu.be/dqGWWQHO_CQ
⭐ GitHub: https://github.com/pjl914335852-ux/Binance-guardian-ai

This project participates in Binance AI Hackathon 2026, showcasing an innovative safety solution powered by OpenClaw + Binance API + AI.

Making crypto investment accessible beyond just young people—giving every family a trusted digital asset safety guardian.

1 BNB isn't much, but it's enough to protect a family's safety.

#BinanceHackathon #OpenClaw #AI #CryptoSafety #Blockchain #TelegramBot #OpenSource
```

## Hacker News 版本

### 标题
```
Show HN: Binance Guardian AI – Crypto safety assistant for non-technical users
```

### 正文
```
I built a crypto safety assistant for my parents using OpenClaw + Claude. It supports:

- Multi-chain contract detection (9 blockchains)
- 0-100 risk scoring system
- Plain language translation of crypto jargon
- Voice safety education
- Guardian mode for elderly users

The goal is to bridge the trust and knowledge gap for the 60%+ of crypto users who lack technical backgrounds.

Tech stack: OpenClaw (agent orchestration), Claude Sonnet 4.6 + Gemini 3.1 Flash (dual-model routing), Binance API (read-only), Telegram Bot.

Performance: <500ms response time, ~32MB memory, 100+ concurrent users, 99.9% uptime, ~$11/month cost.

Video demo: https://youtu.be/dqGWWQHO_CQ
GitHub: https://github.com/pjl914335852-ux/Binance-guardian-ai

Built for Binance AI Hackathon 2026. Feedback welcome!
```

## 使用建议

1. **Twitter/X**: 使用短版本，配上项目截图或视频缩略图
2. **LinkedIn**: 使用完整版本，添加专业标签
3. **微信公众号**: 使用完整版本，添加更多图片和视频
4. **V2EX/掘金/知乎**: 使用完整版本，鼓励讨论
5. **Reddit/Hacker News**: 使用英文版本，简洁明了

所有版本都已准备好，你可以根据需要选择使用！
